The '''''Dianoga''''' was a modified attack [[Starship/Legends|ship]] operated by the [[Realspace/Legends|space]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Gir Kybo Ren-Cha]], several [[Time/Legends|years]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

==Characteristics==
The make and model of the ''Dianoga'' was unknown, but it was armed with at least two [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]]. Not to be confused with the [[Dianoga-class assault starfighter|Dianoga]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], Captain Kybo's [[Starship/Legends|ship]] appeared to possess a sturdy battering ram, capable of hitting a light [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] at full [[Sublight engine/Legends|speed]]. It also had a small docking tube that could melt the hull of the underside of a targeted ship, allowing for the docking and capture of the target and its contents.

==History==
When flying into battle, [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Kybo was always accompanied by stolen and modified [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/ln starfighters]], piloted by his henchmen. He used the ''Dianoga'' once to attack a freighter piloted by a young [[Gender/Legends|woman]] named [[Jessica Meade]].
